reference: BUT I AM TROUBLED MUCH YOU SHOULD MAKE SO ILL A JOURNEY TO SO LITTLE PURPOSE INDEED I WRIT BY THE FIRST POST AFTER MY ARRIVAL HERE AND CANNOT IMAGINE HOW YOU CAME TO MISS OF MY LETTERS
text: But I am troubled much. You should make so ill a journey to so little purpose. Indeed, I wrote by the first post after my arrival here, and cannot imagine how you came to miss of my letters.
